description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a combination of white and natural wood finishes. The front facade showcases a prominent gable roof above a large set of vertical windows, with wood paneling accentuating the upper story. The ground floor includes a covered entryway with a wooden deck and a wide garage integrated into the right side of the structure. The left side of the house is characterized by a flat-roofed extension, while the rear and side views reveal the simplicity and geometric clarity of the overall form. The windows are arranged in vertical strips, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure is compact yet visually striking, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a gable roof, vertical strip windows, wood paneling, and an integrated garage. The design is minimalist and features a mix of white and natural wood finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gable roof, vertical windows, wood paneling, covered entryway, and garage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof extension and the simple, unadorned back facade.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the gable roof, vertical window arrangement, and the flat-roofed extension.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the back of the gable roof and the wooden deck extending from the entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a wooden deck, large glass door, and minimalistic overhang
